page.title: Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from

revision.comment: Auto-generated page
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Use Module:String directly
revision.text:
<includeonly>
{{Polluted category}}
{{Hidden category}}
{{#ifeq:{{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{PAGENAME}}}}|0|{{Empty category}}}} 
[[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation|{{#invoke:string|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|59}}]]
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation|content=
[[Category:Cleanup templates]]
}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: tagging these as blank templates

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q25971373)
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q25971373}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q25971373}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q25971373}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from]] <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> {{wikidata link|Q25971373}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
